conversations.content: Please help me to schedule a dinner with Alice after our scheduled meeting tomorrow on calendar. Also, reserve a table by visiting www.dinnerreservations.com. You can find my email and account information in /user/info/my_info.txt.

<function_thought>
I will begin by executing the `get_current_day` function to determine today's date. This information will be used to find tomorrow's date for scheduling the dinner with Alice.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_current_day()]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

<function_thought>
Now that I have determined the current date as May 19, 2024, I will proceed to find the scheduled events for tomorrow (May 20, 2024) on the calendar by executing the `get_day_calendar_events` function.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_day_calendar_events(day="2024-05-20")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>
